prose: **TEMPO frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (density fit), performed using PySCF. Charge 0, multiplicity 2 (open-shell). **Gas phase**. Geometry: loaded from an external file (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz), no re-optimization performed. HOMO = −6.3375 eV, LUMO = −2.4651 eV → **gap ≈ 3.8724 eV**. Calculation used 12 SCF cycles and was converged. The output JSON has been written to tempo_frontier.json and the run logged to the live .out file. The calculation is trustworthy and no warnings were reported. Command used: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 2 --solvent none --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz --out tempo_frontier.json`.
